title: goodenia humilis
intro: Goodenia humilis, also known as dwarf goodenia or kidney weed, is a small, annual herb native to eastern Australia and southern New South Wales. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Goodenia humilis include its ability to help alleviate kidney and urinary tract issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and relieve pain. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea or infusion, which is often used to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
